---
title: "Preview of Axioms"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
---

List of ZFC axioms.

::: {.callout-important icon="false"}
## Axiom of Empty Set

There exist a set such that no set is an element of it.

$$
\exists A \forall a (a \not \in A).
$$
:::

::: {.callout-important icon="false"}
## Axiom of extensionality


:::

::: {.callout-important icon="false"}
## Axiom of regularity


:::
